scripts.deploy:api-gateway:staging: cd infra/cloudflare/workers/api-gateway && npx wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy:api-gateway:prod: cd infra/cloudflare/workers/api-gateway && npx wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run deploy:api-gateway:staging && npm run deploy:app-web:staging && npm run deploy:official-web:staging
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run deploy:api-gateway:prod && npm run deploy:app-web:prod && npm run deploy:official-web:prod
